name: Chow Tai Seng Jewellery Co., Ltd.
summary: Chow Tai Seng Jewellery Co., Ltd. provides jewelry in China. It also provides diamond mosaic products. In addition, the company offers gold jewelry, as well as platinum, karat gold, jadeite, pearl, and others. It sells its products through franchise, self-operated stores, and e-commerce. The company was founded in 2007 and is based in Shenzhen, China. Chow Tai Seng Jewellery Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Shenzhen Zhoushi Investment Co., Ltd.
